message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Train Model Class Diagram

skinparam packageStyle rectangle

package "Module" {
  package "TrainModel" {

    class Train {
      {field} ~ id : String
      {field} ~ weight : double
      {field} ~ height : double
      {field} ~ length : double
      {field} ~ width : double
      {field} ~ numCars : int
      {field} ~ capacity : int
      {field} ~ lineColor : String
      {field} ~ grade : double
      {field} ~ gpsStatus : boolean
      {field} ~ mboStatus : boolean
      {field} ~ engineFailureStatus : boolean
      {field} ~ signalFailureStatus : boolean
      {field} ~ brakeFailureStatus : boolean
      {field} ~ nextStationID : String
      {field} ~ timeOfArrival : double
      {field} ~ arrivalStatus : boolean
      {field} ~ numPassengers : int
      {field} ~ currentSpeed : double
      {field} ~ CTCSpeed : double
      {field} ~ CTCAuthority : double
      {field} ~ powerOut : double
      {field} ~ leftDoorStatus : boolean
      {field} ~ rightDoorStatus : boolean
      {field} ~ lightsStatus : boolean
      {field} ~ temperature : int
      {field} ~ serviceBrake : boolean
      {field} ~ emerBrake : boolean
      {field} ~ trainActive : boolean
      {field} ~ force : double
      {field} ~ normalForce : double
      {field} ~ downwardForce : double
      {field} ~ totalForce : double
      {field} ~ friction : double
      {field} ~ slope : double
      {field} ~ finalSpeed : double
      {field} ~ trainAcceleration : double
      {field} ~ gpsSignal : Gps
      {field} ~ trainModelGUI : TrainModelNewGUI
      {field} ~ trainList : TrainModel[]
      {method} - showTrainGUI()
      {method} ~ updateTrainValues()
      {method} ~ CreateNewGUI(TrainModel)
      {method} ~ activateFailureModeTest()
      {method} ~ endFailureModeTest()
      {method} ~ getTrainController()
      {method} ~ updateTrainList()
      {method} ~ updateArrivalStatus()
      {method} ~ setPos(double)
      {method} ~ getPos()
      {method} ~ getGrade(Block)
      {method} ~ getSetpointSpeed()
      {method} ~ setSetpointSpeed()
      {method} ~ getAuthority()
      {method} ~ setAuthority(double)
      {method} ~ setLightStatus(boolean)
      {method} ~ setLeftDoorStatus(boolean)
      {method} ~ setRightDoorStatus(boolean)
      {method} ~ setTemperature(int)
      {method} ~ truncateTo(double,int)
    }

    class Gps {
      {field} ~ line : String
      {field} ~ currPos : double[2]
      {method} - setGpsPos(double[2])
      {method} - getGpsPos()
    }

    class TrainModel {
      {field} ~ trainID : String
      {field} ~ trainModel : TrainModel
      {field} ~ time : SimTime
      {field} ~ trncntrl : TrainController
      {field} ~ trkmdl : TrackModel
      {method} - calcDeltaTime(SimTime, SimTime) : integer
      {method} - updateList()
      {method} ~ timeUpdate(SimTime)
      {method} ~ getTrainAtBlock(Block)
      {method} ~ sendBeacon(trainID,int)
      {method} ~ dispatchTrainToBlock(String, String, int, String[])
      {method} ~ transmitCtcAuthority(String, double)
      {method} ~ suggestSetpointSpeed(String, double)
      {method} ~ setEmergencyBrake(String, boolean)
      {method} ~ setSchedule(String, String[])
      {method} ~ setBeacon(String, int_32)
      {method} ~ getPosition(String) : String[2]
      {method} ~ setPower(String, double)
      {method} ~ setLeft(String, boolean)
      {method} ~ setRight(String, boolean)
      {method} ~ setService(String, boolean)
      {method} ~ setEmergency(String, boolean)
      {method} ~ setLights(String, boolean)
      {method} ~ setTemperature(String, int)
      {method} ~ setTrainPosition(String) : String[2]
      {method} ~ setTrainActualSpeed(String) : double
    }

    class TrainModelNewGUI {
      {field} ~ trainModel : TrainModel
      {method} - setValuesForDisplay(TrainModel)
      {method} - setEmerBrakeButtonPressed()
    }

  }
}

package "Shared" {
  interface Module {
    {method} ~ timeUpdate(SimTime) : Boolean
  }

  class SimTime {
    {field} ~ hr : int
    {field} ~ min : int
    {field} ~ sec : int
    {method} ~ toString() : String
  }
}

class TrainModel as "TrainModel" <<C>> #lightgreen

Train "contains\n1..*" --> Gps
Train "0..*\ninstantiates" --> TrainModelNewGUI
TrainModel .right.|> TrainModel : implements
TrainModel "1..*" --> TrainModel
Module ..> TrainModel : Instantiates
TrainModel ..> SimTime : imports

@enduml
```
